title: Better Food
description: The data pack improves the food in minecraft. Now there is no better food, each is unique in its own way. Many underrated types of food have been given a new lease of life!
body:
![Better Food!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dff0d5d4d65344910fc1840edd5b54580c35b902.png)

# **🍪 Features**
The datapack introduces additions that change the mechanics of food and give it some special features. New types of food have also been added! Now complex crafts correspond to cooked food, how much satiety it brings! And much more! _(Sorry, there may be mistakes here as I don't speak English.)_

**▪ Cake:** When you eat each piece of cake, you will be given effects...
- 1 piece: regeneration, resistance, strength for 10 seconds!
- 2 piece: regeneration, resistance, strength for 10 seconds!
- 3 piece: regeneration for 10 seconds, resistance, strength for 20 seconds!
- 4 piece: regeneration for 10 seconds, resistance, strength for 20 seconds!
- 5 piece: regeneration for 10 seconds, resistance, strength for 25 seconds!
- 6 piece: regeneration for 10 seconds, resistance, strength for 25 seconds!
- 6 piece: regeneration for 10 seconds, resistance, strength for 25 seconds!
- **+** full saturation for each piece!

New Cake Craft:

![new_cake_craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4cd31adc79806a48ee5be9df9360ee753fca41d.png)

**▪ Cookie:** When eaten, it gives the effect of haste for 10 to 60 seconds. With a 2.5% chance, it produces a haste effect of 2 for 40 seconds!

**▪ Glow Berries:** When you eat glowing berries, you get a glowing effect for 1 minute!

**▪ Beetroot Soup:** Now you can eat 1 beetroot soup 4 times!

**▪ Mushroom Stew:** Now you can eat 1 mushroom stew 8 times!

**▪ Rabbit Stew:** Now you can eat 1 rabbit stew 10 times!

**▪ Chorus Fruit:** After eating the сhorus fruit, you will get a speed effect for 5 seconds!

**▪ Honey Bottle:** If you drink a honey bottle, you will be satisfied with 6-20 units of hunger!

**▪ Spider eye:** When eating a spider's eye, you will get the effect of night vision for 2 minutes, but it will still poison you!

**▪ Poisonous Potato:** When eating, you will get the effects: poison, hunger, nausea for 5 seconds!

**▪ Raw Cod & Raw Salmon:** If you eat with a 50% chance, you will get poisoned!

**▪ Tropical Fish:** When you eat, you are saturated with 6 units of hunger!

**▪ Pumpkin Pie:** When you eat, you are saturated with 12 units of hunger!

**▪ Dried Kelp:** When you eat, you are saturated with 3 units of hunger!

# **🥩 Additions**
**▪ Golden Potato:** When you eat, you are satiated by 4 units of hunger! + Effects: regeneration 2 for 5 seconds and Absorption for 2 minutes!

**▪ Golden Beetroot:** When you eat, you are satiated by 4 units of hunger! + Effects: regeneration 2 for 5 seconds and Absorption for 2 minutes!

**▪ Golden Sweet Berries:** When you eat, you are satiated by 6 units of hunger!

**▪ Golden Slice Of Melon:** When you eat, you are satiated by 6 units of hunger!
